vocab.meaning: sự thiết kế lại mãn nhãn/đẹp về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: The platform recently launched an aesthetically pleasing redesign that simplifies the whole user experience.

vocab.meaning: hệ thống cũ kỹ, lỗi thời và chậm chạp
vocab.example: I've noticed that many government websites are finally ditching their clunky legacy systems for more modern frameworks.

vocab.meaning: sự tích hợp đa nền tảng mượt mà
vocab.example: One major change is the seamless cross-platform integration, allowing me to start a task on my desktop and finish it on my phone.

vocab.meaning: các hạn chế về tường phí (yêu cầu trả tiền để xem tiếp)
vocab.example: More news outlets are implementing strict paywall restrictions, which makes accessing high-quality journalism quite costly.

vocab.meaning: luồng điều hướng trực quan, dễ dùng
vocab.example: The latest update improved the intuitive navigational flow, so I no longer get lost in endless sub-menus.

vocab.meaning: tích hợp chế độ nền tối
vocab.example: Many of the educational sites I visit have started to incorporate dark mode to reduce eye strain during late-night study sessions.

vocab.meaning: tăng cường/củng cố quyền riêng tư dữ liệu
vocab.example: In response to new regulations, several social media sites have updated their settings to bolster data privacy.

vocab.meaning: phong cách thẩm mỹ tối giản
vocab.example: I’ve observed a shift toward a minimalist aesthetic, removing unnecessary sidebars to focus purely on the content.
Thanks to continuous algorithmic refinement, my favorite video-sharing site now suggests content that is perfectly aligned with my interests.

vocab.meaning: quảng cáo gây phiền nhiễu/xâm lấn
vocab.example: I’ve stopped visiting certain forums because they’ve become saturated with intrusive advertising that disrupts the reading flow.
